mapper.insert: insert into pr_wechat_bind_record(house_id, heat_pay_code, wx_open_id, org_id, org_name, building_id, building_name, unit_code, room_num, create_by, create_time) values(#{houseId}, #{heatPayCode}, #{wxOpenId}, #{orgId}, #{orgName}, #{buildingId}, #{buildingName}, #{unitCode}, #{roomNum}, #{createBy}, now())
